content.en:
"These two are so rich!"

Ye Tian opened the personal storage space of the two five-star peak god generals and said in shock.

Just the Divine Coins, the two of them have tens of thousands, but there are also 10 Dao Coins, which is far more than other Divine Generals!

Obviously, this net worth should be obtained by two people who killed people and crossed the goods.

In addition to the divine coins, there are also many various treasures on the two of them, such as chaos spirit treasures, various top elixir spirit plant ores, etc., as well as many exercise books.

Ye Tian took a long time to sort it out, and threw away all the treasures containing other people's soul marks, these things containing other people's soul marks represented threats, maybe these two people were not afraid, but he didn't know who these things came from, so he didn't dare to take them rashly.

What is worth surprising Ye Tian is that the two of them have a lot of resources that can temper their physical bodies, and they are even useful to the six-star god generals, obviously prepared by the two of them for themselves, and now they all fall into Ye Tian's pocket.

But what excites him in the end is a supernatural power.

"The Great Divine Power of Life - the Great Divine Power of Secret Breath!"

According to the introduction, this secret breath great divine power ranks 241st among the three thousand great divine powers, which is already quite high, and this is an auxiliary great divine power, and it is absolutely very powerful to have such a high ranking.

In addition to the Secret Breath Divine Power, there is also a relatively garbage Secret Breath Divine Power Fragment, which is a fragment created by a great power based on the Secret Breath Great Divine Power.

That's right, it's a deliberately created fragment, not just a part.

The cultivation requirements of this fragment are much lower, although it requires god-level life talent and god-level stealth talent, but it does not need to be fused, so as long as you have god-level life talent and god-level stealth talent, you can cultivate this fragment.

The cultivation conditions have been reduced a lot, which has led to many people being able to practice the remnants of the Secret Breath Great Divine Power, and the previous black-armored youth has practiced this fragment, which can cover his life breath so that others cannot detect it, and he can also hide his body.

But this fragment has a flaw, that is, it can't hide from the gods who are stronger than themselves.

That black-armored young man is a five-star peak god general, which means that his secret breath great magic power fragment cannot hide from a six-star god general.

Because of now, this fragment is a very rubbish kind in the chaos, but when it is used to deal with weak gods, this fragment is a supreme divine skill.

Ye Tian couldn't look down on this fragment of the secret breath supernatural power, he was interested in the complete version of the secret supernatural power.

He is qualified to cultivate this secret breath great divine power, once he is cultivated, no one at the god general level will be able to detect his life breath, in this way, he will be extremely safe in this secret world.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took a moment to fuse the life talent with the stealth talent, and then began to use a life-like innate origin object to start cultivating the secret breath supernatural power.

This life-type innate origin thing was naturally obtained from the black-armored youth, and the other party also seemed to want to cultivate the true secret breath supernatural power, so he had already prepared a relatively good life-type innate origin thing, called the life true earth.

I have to say that this black-armored young man is really a fortune boy!

Under the acceleration of time, it only took Ye Tian a few decades to completely cultivate the Great Divine Power of Secret Breath, which was also the benefit of Ye Tian's god-level extreme transcendence talent.

If not, if it were him from before, I am afraid it would take a long time to be able to practice.

After cultivating the Secret Breath Great Divine Power, Ye Tian opened this Secret Breath Great Divine Power and completely concealed his life breath.

However, if it is too close to him, some very powerful gods will still be able to sense it, unless he can cultivate the secret breath great divine power to the consummation realm, that is really terrifying, even if the seven or eight star gods will stand in front of him, it is estimated that they will not be able to sense his existence.

After possessing the Secret Breath Great Divine Power, Ye Tian was simply swimming in water in this Secret Realm World, and he didn't need to be so cautious at all.

One resource after another fell into his hands, and he was not afraid of being discovered by others.

Of course, sometimes I was unlucky, and I met some six-star or even seven-star god generals, but I relied on my secret breath to hide the breath of life with all my might, and I never moved.

It wasn't until those six or seven star gods were going to leave that he chose to leave here.

Hundreds of years later.

Ye Tian had already harvested a lot of resources, and relying on these resources, he was even sure that he would rush to the six-star god general in a short period of time.

However, at this time, the Secret Realm Great World obviously does not have a lot of resources, after all, hundreds of thousands of Divine Generals have poured in, how can a Secret Realm Great World withstand the looting of so many Divine Generals!

this day.

Ye Tian found that many god generals were shuttling in one direction, and out of curiosity, he also followed.

Soon, he found a bunch of gods gathered together, and everyone was extremely wary of the other gods, but none of them left.

Preliminary calculation, at least tens of thousands of gods have gathered here!

And in the center of this area, there is a mountain peak, and on the peak of the mountain spreads a vine, a blood-red vine, around the entire peak.

After Ye Tian appeared here, he didn't continue to maintain the secret breath supernatural power.

There are so many gods here, maybe there is one god general who has mastered other great powers that can penetrate the secret breath, and if he is still hidden, it will be easy to be targeted.

Moreover, some disciples of the Void Heaven Hall are also here, and he is not without backers.

Let's not talk about the attitude of these Void Heaven Hall disciples towards him, but in so many situations, these Void Heaven Hall disciples must support him.

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared beside the disciples of the Void Heaven Palace, there were a total of more than a dozen disciples of the Void Heaven Hall here, and the first one was the Imperial Divine General of the Early Stage of the Seven Star Divine Generals.

This Imperial Divine General saw Ye Tian, but ignored Ye Tian and did not call him Shizu.

After all, in the eyes of this Imperial Heaven Divine General, his talent was enough to surpass some of the official disciples of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

If it weren't for the fact that his master was not high, he wouldn't have glanced at Ye Tian at all.

And some other disciples of the Void Heaven Hall still call Ye Tiansheng Master, and this bit of face still has to be given.

"Divine Commander Ota Spirit, isn't everyone's goal that vine?"

Ye Tian asked.

"That's good!" Ota God General nodded, but still replied to Ye Tian, and said: "This vine is not an ordinary vine, but a blood-devouring vine, its body is as strong as a top-notch chaos spirit treasure, and it can partially ignore energy attacks, once it is hit by the blood-devouring vine, a body of blood will be absorbed by it." The strength of this blood-devouring vine has now reached the level of a seven-star mid-stage or even late-stage god general, and its threat is even more terrifying than that of a seven-star late-stage god general. "

"What's the use of this blood-devouring vine?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Its juice can quench blood and create true blood, and if there are enough blood-devouring vines, it is enough to transform the blood veins on the body into three. "Ota God will have some hope.

"Sancheng True Blood!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply.

What is this concept?

The average true blood descendant has eight or nine thousandths of the true blood in his body, and the true blood descendant with a relatively high blood concentration can reach one or two percent.

A true blood descendant genius can have one true blood, and one true blood is enough to cause a sensation in the true blood descendant family.

As for outsiders, it's too difficult and too difficult to have a true blood.

However, the blood-devouring vine can convert thirty percent of the blood in a person's body into true blood, which is too rebellious.

Ye Tian's true blood level was comparable to that of a relatively good true blood descendant, but it was only three or four percent of the concentration, far less than one percent of true blood.

If you can get the juice of the blood-devouring vine, you will make a lot of money, and your strength will skyrocket in a short period of time.

However, there are so many god generals here, even if you kill the blood-devouring vines, the competition is extremely fierce, and I don't know how many god generals will fall.

As time passed, the gods still didn't do anything.

In addition, many gods will capture fierce beasts one by one and throw them into the mountain peaks, allowing the blood-devouring vines to devour these fierce beasts.

At first, Ye Tian didn't understand why.

But soon, he knew why.

They are letting the blood-devouring vine transform again, in this way, although the strength will be increased to the combat power of the seven-star late stage god general, which is enough to threaten the seven-star peak god general, but its quality is better, and the effect of refining blood is better.

The point is that this blood-devouring vine is only one step away from metamorphosing, and they naturally want to help it transform, so that the harvest after killing the blood-devouring vine will be higher.
